title: Fix marketplace layout
description: Investigate the marketplace gallery page issues shown in the screenshot and fix the underlying layout/interaction problems in the demo without removing the route.

title: Reorganize gallery groups
description: Remove the Shadcn parity and AI elements group headers from the gallery navigation and reassign all of those pages into logical existing or new groups without deleting any routes.

title: Polish tool demos
description: Apply the compact tool styling to /gallery/tool-calls, tighten surrounding demo copy for tool and reasoning, and clarify whether tool and tool-calls remain distinct routes.

title: Simplify tool-call rows
description: Reduce tool-call UI to compact icon-plus-toolname rows with expandable input/output, removing the oversized timeline/card treatment.

title: Polish AI elements and parity surfaces
description: Address the full UI feedback pass across AI elements, parity components, gallery frontmatter typography, brand lockup, and shared control usage. This includes dropdown/button/textarea adoption, compact conversation and tool-call patterns, copy actions, syntax highlighting, context display corrections, attachment close icon positioning, parity polish for toggle/textarea and other shadcn parity components, deduping overlapping components, and aligning brand/gallery presentation with the Aurora design language.

title: Expand Aurora color token semantics
description: Why this issue exists and what needs to be done: define an expanded Aurora color token contract covering brand, semantic state, and interaction tokens; document the design; and scope the gallery/demo rollout so implementation can follow a reviewed spec.

title: Implement Aurora registry taxonomy
description: Implement the hybrid registry taxonomy from docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-11-aurora-registry-taxonomy-design.md: move style and block source paths, update registry metadata, regenerate public registry payloads, update docs, and verify lint/build gates.
close_reason: Implemented registry taxonomy, regenerated public registry payloads, updated docs, and verified lint/composition/build gates.

title: Define Aurora registry taxonomy
description: Write and record a design for organizing the Aurora shadcn registry around a hybrid primitive-plus-agent-app structure. Capture recommended top-level directories, domain groups under blocks, and migration guidance for docs and discovery.
design: Recommended hybrid taxonomy: keep ui/styles/hooks/icons flat and organize product-facing blocks by domain.

title: Polish marketplace states
description: Review the marketplace's secondary states after the recent layout cleanup, especially table view, active source filtering, empty results, and detail sheet presentation. Tighten any remaining rough UI or interaction edges and land the next refinement pass.

title: Continue marketplace visual refinement
description: The marketplace gallery demo is improved but still needs another visual polish pass. Review the live desktop and mobile states, refine spacing, hierarchy, card density, and filter/sidebar presentation, then land the next iteration.

title: Polish marketplace gallery demo
description: The marketplace gallery route still looks under-polished after the overflow fix. Tighten hierarchy, layout density, interaction affordances, and responsive behavior for the marketplace block and its demo so the page feels intentional and production-ready.

title: Condense reasoning summary
description: Reduce the reasoning UI to a compact icon plus label treatment instead of a wide column-sized panel, while keeping the content expandable.

title: Refine tool-calls layout
description: Update the tool-calls component so it does not reserve a wide tool-name column. Use a compact icon-first expandable pattern and align the styling more closely with the timeline component.

title: Polish flagged gallery components
description: Audit and improve the gallery components the user flagged: native-select, breadcrumb, menubar, table/tables, sheet/drawer, ask-user-question mobile overflow, and related UI polish issues found during browser review. Make the demos functional where requested and reduce incorrect or over-assumed UI treatments.

title: Fix brand demo wordmark description
description: Update the brand demo copy so it matches the corrected Labby wordmark treatment: the last two letters use the blue accent, not a pink y.

title: Correct Labby wordmark accent colors
description: Update the Labby wordmark component so the last two letters use the intended blue accent treatment instead of only the final letter using pink.

title: Audit and polish Aurora gallery components
description: Audit the live aurora.tootie.tv gallery using agent-browser, identify visual and interaction polish issues across served component pages, and implement the corresponding UI fixes in this repo.

title: Implement shadcn registry improvements
description: Implement the registry improvements identified during review: replace placeholder registry identity, fix dependency metadata drift, add item metadata fields (author/categories/docs/meta), add explicit target paths where install location matters, add cssVars/css metadata for Tailwind v4-friendly token installation, add branded/content-negotiated registry hosting plus namespace guidance, and version external dependencies consistently.

title: Update Aurora registry URLs
description: Update local config and docs to use the deployed aurora.tootie.tv registry URLs instead of raw GitHub URLs, keeping namespaced installs pointed at /r/{name}.json and documenting the branded root URL behavior.
